events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk — the trench slope doesn't match the allowable angle for the actual soil classification per Subpart P Appendix B tabulated data, creating an active cave-in hazard while work is in-progress. Immediate actions are to stop work, evacuate the trench, have a competent person re-classify soil and re-cut the slope (or install shoring/shielding), then re-inspect before resuming.
